mapper.sql: boardId, userId, userName, category, title, viewCount, likeCount, commentCount, TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, NVL(hidden, 0) as hidden, 0 as reportCount
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId} AND likeCount > 0 ORDER BY likeCount DESC, boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId} AND likeCount > 0
SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId} AND commentCount > 0 ORDER BY commentCount DESC, boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard WHERE userId = #{userId} AND commentCount > 0
SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard ORDER BY boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard WHERE likeCount > 0 ORDER BY likeCount DESC, boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard WHERE likeCount > 0
SELECT * FROM (SELECT FROM freeboard WHERE commentCount > 0 ORDER BY commentCount DESC, boardId DESC) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM freeboard WHERE commentCount > 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT f.boardId, f.userId, f.userName, f.category, f.title, f.viewCount, f.likeCount, f.commentCount, TO_CHAR(f.createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, NVL(f.hidden, 0) as hidden, NVL(r.cnt, 0) as reportCount FROM freeboard f INNER JOIN (SELECT targetId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM freeboard_report GROUP BY targetId) r ON f.boardId = r.targetId ORDER BY r.cnt DESC, f.boardId DESC ) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.commentId as boardId, c.userId, c.userName, '댓글' as category, c.content as title, 0 as viewCount, 0 as likeCount, 0 as commentCount, TO_CHAR(c.createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as createdAt, NVL(c.hidden, 0) as hidden, NVL(r.cnt, 0) as reportCount FROM freeboard_comment c INNER JOIN (SELECT targetId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM freeboard_comment_report GROUP BY targetId) r ON c.commentId = r.targetId ORDER BY r.cnt DESC, c.commentId DESC ) WHERE rownum <= #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE freeboard SET hidden = #{hidden} WHERE boardId = #{boardId}
UPDATE freeboard_comment SET hidden = #{hidden} WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
